title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・3人の未来

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You overtook me... You really are strong, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You're so strong, but you still believe in me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yep. I do.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Heh.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's no fair!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

We suddenly hear Winning Ticket yelling as
they're on the way back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No fair, no fair, no fair, no faaair! It's not cool how well you two are getting along!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I wanna race with you guys toooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Uh, you've only got yourself to blame for getting
injured.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Now, now. No need to cry.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: The three of us are still in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Which means we can race against each other as
often as we wish to.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aww, Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! That is right!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, I know! Let's all race in the autumn Tenno
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It'll be a BNW reunion!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Are you seriously not embarrassed using that
name?

The three of them vow to race together at the
autumn Tenno Sho before parting ways.
